summary: Created src/visual/palette.ts with PaletteFamily type, 7 palette families (tropical/northern/southern/oceanic/continental/temperate/unknown), and classifyGeo() that maps ~60 country codes into 6 coarse climatic classes. Updated geoToPalette() in mappings.ts to use palette families — hue is now constrained to the family's range with seed-based variation, instead of hashing geo+seed into an arbitrary hue. Added 10 unit tests in palette.test.ts and 8 new tests in mappings.test.ts (US-010 block), plus updated T-008-03 and T-008-05 for palette-family behaviour. Build passes, all 292 tests green.
